name: Arceus
description:
Arceus is a mythical creature from the series Pokemon. Said to have created the very universe with 1,000 arms, it existed long before all of creation. It gave birth to the trio that governs time, space and antimatter then all others governing their respective nature in the Pokemon world.

It's appearance resembles either a deer or horse-like being with pointed tipped yellow hooves, a white body with a gray underbelly and bumped joints symbolizing some of what could be the "1,000 arms" in its myth. It's neck is slightly long and the face of it is gray with it lacking a mouth, the eyes if it are green with red pupils. The shape of its head is almost wavy in the back. It has a golden ring circling around the midsection of it, having green gems on it.

As the most ancient of all Pokemon and the very creator, it can utilize all existing moves and possess the power that let it create life and matter.
creator: AnimeMan1993
